methodology: v27 single-run invoke per invoice vs field-accuracy-audit ground truth

taxonomy.A: extraction_bug — Pass C / model error vs visible or GT
taxonomy.B: gt_mismatch — extraction matches visible invoice, GT catalog differs
taxonomy.C: normalization_mismatch — binder/reconcile altered Pass C (none observed v27)
taxonomy.D: business_interpretation — unit semantics, gross/net display, €0 impact fields
